channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pulitzer-winning historian sees doomsday scenario with China and national debt
item.description: Liaquat Ahamed, author of "Lords of Finance," says America's debt crisis mirrors a historical precedent.

item.title: Pulitzer winner warns AI spending boom echoes Great Depression patterns
item.description: The historian behind Lords of Finance warns Silicon Valley that current numbers resemble past economic downturns.

item.title: Trump tells Netanyahu he is losing patience with war, Wall Street interprets as desire to end it
item.description: Key morning briefing for investors ahead of the market open.

item.title: U.S. and Europe feared Iran conflict would curb Gulf investments, but the opposite occurred
item.description: The top five spenders from Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Qatar spent nearly $26 billion in March, April, and May combined.
